# Studio

## What is Twilio Studio?

Twilio Studio is a low-code/no-code visual builder that lets you create, edit, and manage communication workflows. Drag widgets onto the canvas to build voice, messaging, and other communication applications, then add code only when you need custom logic. Studio supports use cases such as order notifications, phone trees, survey tools, and SMS-enabled chatbots.

For plans and pricing, see the [Studio](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/serverless/studio) product page. Additional fees for the underlying Twilio services are not included in Studio pricing.

If you're using Studio to develop HIPAA-compliant healthcare applications, see [Twilio and HIPAA](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/hipaa) for information about requirements and how to get started.

## Get started with Twilio Studio

Get familiar with the Studio canvas and widgets with the [Studio User Guide](/docs/studio/user-guide).

![Flowchart of IVR system with triggers for incoming messages and calls, directing to sales or support.](https://docs-resources.prod.twilio.com/3d5450d6941b51ad7c4cb34b62de3bd42c970f595c3322197c6f6420bd7381a1.png)

## Equip yourself

* Explore the [Studio Widget Library](/docs/studio/widget-library) to learn about available widgets and configuration options.
* Learn more about the [Liquid template language](/docs/studio/user-guide/liquid-template-language) to bring additional functionality to your Flows.
* Visit the [REST API reference page](/docs/studio/rest-api) to learn more about requests you can make.
* Check out [Event Streams](/docs/events) to subscribe to Studio Flow events for real-time reporting.

## Build your app

The following tutorials use ready-made templates for common business use cases:

* [Build an IVR](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-build-an-ivr)
* [Conduct a survey](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-conduct-a-survey)
* [Build a chatbot](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-build-a-chatbot)
* [Send appointment reminders](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-send-appointment-reminders)
* [Set up an SMS auto-responder](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-set-up-auto-responder)
* [Forward calls](/docs/studio/tutorials/how-to-forward-calls)
